headline: Why Costco's Warehouse Growth Story Is Far From Over
summary: Costco plans 26 net-new warehouses in fiscal 2026 as U.S. relocations and a deep international pipeline extend its growth runway.

headline: 1 S&P 500 Stock Worth Your Attention and 2 We Question
summary: While the S&P 500 (^GSPC) includes industry leaders, not every stock in the index is a winner. Some companies are past their prime, weighed down by poor execution, weak financials, or structural headwinds.

headline: Target Introduces Exclusive Baby Collection Picolette by Olivia Culpo, Offering Elevated Essentials and Gifts at Affordable Prices
summary: Target Corporation (NYSE: TGT) knows that busy families are craving special items at affordable prices to mark important milestones. With that in mind, the retailer today announced the launch of Picolette, an exclusive baby collection created by entrepreneur, model and new mom Olivia Culpo. The Target-exclusive 60-item collection of baby apparel, accessories, mealtime essentials, keepsakes and gifts combines elevated design, thoughtful functionality and affordable prices. Picolette launches July

headline: Guggenheim Maintains Buy on Target, Raises Price Target to $150
summary: Guggenheim  analyst John Heinbockel   maintains Target (NYSE:TGT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $145 to $150.
